result.summary: Created two close-search refinements: Pogo Storm gains three early rotating threat patterns for encounter variety; Orbitbound gains a front-loaded telegraphed ring clamp that makes radial hops necessary. Live motion, attachment alignment, moving threats, restart, schema, typecheck, and bundle checks passed. One sealed Orbitbound render attempt (n_0004) was excluded after its background occluded rings and HUD; n_0005 repairs only that rendering issue.
